# Support

## Getting Help

Need help with envcheck-cli? Here's how to get support:

### 📚 Documentation

Start with the docs:
- [README](../README.md) - Overview and quick start
- [FAQ](../docs/FAQ.md) - Common questions and solutions
- [Examples](../docs/EXAMPLES.md) - Usage examples and patterns
- [Integrations](../docs/INTEGRATIONS.md) - CI/CD setup guides

### 💬 Community Support

- **GitHub Discussions** - Ask questions, share ideas, and connect with other users
- **Issues** - Report bugs or request features (use the appropriate template)

### 🐛 Bug Reports

Found a bug? Please [open an issue](https://github.com/bitreon/envcheck-cli/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with:
- Clear description of the problem
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Your environment (Node.js version, OS)

### 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea? [Open a feature request](https://github.com/bitreon/envcheck-cli/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) and tell us:
- What problem you're trying to solve
- How you envision it working
- Why it would benefit others

### 🔒 Security Issues

Found a security vulnerability? Please don't open a public issue. Instead:
- Email the maintainers (see package.json)
- Or use GitHub's private security advisory feature

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for details.

### 🤝 Contributing

Want to contribute? Check out [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

## Response Times

This is an open-source project maintained by volunteers. We'll do our best to respond quickly, but please be patient:

- **Critical bugs**: Within 48 hours
- **Feature requests**: Within 1 week
- **Questions**: Within 1 week
- **PRs**: Within 1 week

## What We Can't Help With

- General programming questions unrelated to envcheck-cli
- Issues with your specific codebase (unless it's a bug in envcheck)
- Custom development or consulting work

For these, consider:
- Stack Overflow for general programming questions
- Hiring a consultant for custom work

## Stay Updated

- ⭐ Star the repo to show support
- 👀 Watch the repo for updates
- 📢 Follow releases for new versions

Thanks for using envcheck-cli!
